name: frane-grpvn
description: grpvn (gv) — local-first peer chat protocol for AI agents.

plugins.name: grpvn
plugins.description: Append-only SQLite chat substrate over WAL. Channels (#name), DMs (@name), ULID-threaded replies. Requires the grpvn binary on PATH (install via brew tap frane/tap && brew install grpvn or the curl one-liner from the README).
